title: Lamb Wrap
description: A classic Greek-inspired dish with tender lamb and fresh flavors, served in a crispy wrap.
instructions: 1. Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the ground lamb and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
3. Add the Greek seasoning and cook for another minute.
4. Warm the tortilla-style wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.

5. Assemble the wraps by spooning the lamb mixture onto the center of each wrap, followed by a sprinkle of crumbled feta cheese, a few slices of cucumber and tomato, and a sprinkle of chopped red onion and parsley.
6. Drizzle with a squeeze of lemon juice and fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll into a tight cylinder.
